description: The Copper CRM command line no one else built: full CRUD plus a local database, weighted pipeline forecasting, stale-deal detection, and the bulk operations Copper's own API refuses to provide.

novel_features.name: Weighted pipeline forecast
novel_features.description: Weighted expected-revenue roll-up: sums monetary_value x win_probability over open opportunities, grouped by stage, assignee, or close-month.

novel_features.name: Stale-deal sweep
novel_features.description: Surfaces open opportunities with no interaction in N days, sorted by staleness x value, across all reps.

novel_features.name: Bulk write engine
novel_features.description: Applies field updates (stage, owner, custom fields) across many opportunities with bounded concurrency and heuristic 429 backoff.

novel_features.name: Idempotent upsert
novel_features.description: Match-then-create-or-update for people and leads; normalizes the people.emails[] vs leads.email shape difference.

novel_features.name: Duplicate finder
novel_features.description: Local SQLite self-join surfacing people or leads that share an email, name, or company.

novel_features.name: Activity log and correct
novel_features.description: Creates an activity with the type resolved by name (bumps interaction_count); log fix deletes and recreates to edit an immutable activity.

novel_features.name: Contact-graph lookup
novel_features.description: Joins an opportunity to its company, people, and recent activities into one related-records view.
